final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input [31:0] data_in,
    output reg [31:0] data_out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or negedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (~reset) begin
            data_out <= 0;
        end else if (load) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end
    end

endmodule
